{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies a conceptual issue (framing of 'rolling re-planning') but doesn't fully propose a tighter framing or connect it to prior work.", "R1.4": "Names one prior work (augmented Lagrangian scheduling) and articulates a delta, but lacks comparison to other relevant works.", "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement; only mentions references in passing.", "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for some claims (e.g., 'broad recent activity'), but doesn't provide specific confidence levels or missing evidence.", "RX.3": "Mostly within scope, with some minor drifts (e.g., the paragraph on sim-to-real dynamics mismatch).", "RX.4": "No regressions identified.", "RX.5": "No provenance or traceability information provided."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.4": 0.7, "R1.7": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.6, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies a conceptual issue (framing of 'rolling re-planning') but doesn't fully propose a tighter framing or connect it to prior work.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (augmented Lagrangian scheduling) and articulates a delta, but lacks comparison to other relevant works.
rationale.R1.7: No citation-level engagement; only mentions references in passing.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims (e.g., 'broad recent activity'), but doesn't provide specific confidence levels or missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, with some minor drifts (e.g., the paragraph on sim-to-real dynamics mismatch).
rationale.RX.5: No provenance or traceability information provided.
